Cellphone Price Prediction System
Tools Used: Python (Pandas, Scikit-learn, Streamlit)

Tools Used: Python (Pandas, Matplotlib)

Filtered and analyzed thousands of entries to isolate 1990s content, achieving a focused subset for strategic insights.
Engineered a custom logic to identify duration trends and uncovered the most common movie length in that decade.
Highlighted the scarcity of short-duration action movies, uncovering content gaps for potential production opportunities.
